overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a red leather jacket walking along a waterfront promenade at night. The character ascends stairs to an upper plaza with illuminated skyscrapers, passes another pedestrian, and continues under a concrete overpass. The environment features urban architecture, street lighting, and sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade between retaining wall and railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the lower waterfront promenade toward a distant staircase

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall running along the left side of the walkway
black metal railing separating the walkway from the water
ornate black street lamp with glowing light
stack of colorful vending machines on the right side near the railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow waterfront promenade at night, flanked by a stone wall on the left and metal railing on the right. Street lamps provide illumination as the character approaches a wide staircase in the distance. A few pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide stone staircase ascending to upper plaza

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone stairs from lower waterfront to upper plaza level
illuminated skyscrapers become visible against the night sky as the character reaches the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the upper city plaza level

entered.detail: broad stone staircase leading upward between high walls
stone wall with balustrade on the left side of the stairs
stone wall on the right side of the staircase
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by high walls, transitioning from the lower waterfront to an upper plaza. As the character reaches the top, the view opens up to reveal a dramatic city skyline with illuminated glass skyscrapers against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with skyscraper views and wooden decking

events.description: character passes a pedestrian in a gray coat walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper plaza with illuminated skyscrapers visible in the background, approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray coat walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern glass buildings with bright illuminated windows against the night sky
multi-story modern building with lit windows on the right side
decorative trees planted along the plaza edge
wooden plank decking covering the plaza ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open wooden plaza with stunning views of illuminated skyscrapers. A pedestrian in a gray coat passes by walking in the opposite direction. The area features modern architecture, parked vehicles, and decorative trees as the character approaches a concrete overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass bridge

events.description: character walks under the concrete overpass into a covered walkway area with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path under the shadow of the overpass bridge

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure overhead casting shadows on the walkway
sheltered pedestrian walkway under the bridge with wall-mounted lights

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the character continues along the waterfront path, with the bridge structure dominating overhead and palm trees visible in the distance beyond the covered area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined waterfront promenade that opens into a luminous city plaza before descending into the shadows of an urban overpass. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path flanked by a stone wall and metal railings, moving toward a wide staircase under the glow of street lamps. As the character ascends the stone stairs, the view expands from the enclosed walkway to reveal a dramatic skyline of illuminated glass skyscrapers against the night sky. The scene then shifts across an open wooden plaza where the character passes a pedestrian in a gray coat amidst modern architecture and decorative trees. Finally, the environment transitions from the bright city lights into a darker, shadowed covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, with distant palm trees visible beyond the structure.
